meaning: adj.模仿的,假装的,[生]拟态的n.效颦者,模仿者,小丑,仿制品vt.模仿,摹拟
examples: At school I was a good mimic.
The robot was programmed to mimic a series of human movements.
He could mimic anybody, and he often reduced Isabel to helpless laughter.
So why do some people think we should mimic the French and the Greeks?
